meaning: 瓦加杜古[布基纳法索首都]
examples: The talks continue in Ouagadougou this week.
This includes one million people in the capital, Ouagadougou.
Karaoke at the Burkina Faso capital, Ouagadougou, visit an HIV voluntary counseling and testing center.
His successor in Ouagadougou is Ibrahim Emad who has scored five goals to become top scorer.
The Director-General commended the activities of 2iE in Ouagadougou, a UNESCO Category 2 Centre.
